calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay This Case Pending Silicosis Cases Petition For Coordination; Declaration Of James T. Spratt
Off Calendar Jul-10-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Charley Rodolfo Velasco Ariza, Esq., Brayton Purcell 415-493-3512 cvelascoariza@braytonlaw.com Attorneys for Plaintiffs JOEL MARTINEZ ORDAZ and
MARYCRUZ RODRIGUEZ MARQUEZ
James T. Spratt, Esq., LYDECKER (213) 226-7068 jspratt@lydecker.com Attorneys for Defendant Caesarstone USA, Inc

Hearing held. Discussed, not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CAESARSTONE USA, INC.'s Motion To Stay This Case Pending Silicosis Cases Petition For Coordination.

Defendant Caesarstone USA, Inc.'s motion to stay this case pending adjudication of the coordination petition is denied. The statutes governing coordination vest the coordination judge with the power to stay the proceedings. CCP 404.5 provides that "Pending any determination of whether coordination is appropriate, the judge making that determination may stay any action being considered for, or affecting an action being considered for, coordination." Though section 404.5 does not deprive the court of the authority to stay proceedings, it evinces the Legislature's intent for the coordination judge to decide whether cases are stayed pre-coordination.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliane with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
